reference: Hello Doctor, I am twenty years old. I have a problem where my hands shake all the time. When I want to speak to a new person, my hands shake more and my voice changes. Even when I am giving a seminar, I cannot take the session and my voice comes out differently. Can you please explain the reason behind this?
text: Hello, doctor. I am twenty years old. I have a problem where my hands shake all the time. When I want to speak to a new person, my hands shake more and my voice changes. Even when I am giving a seminar, I cannot take the session and my voice comes out differently. Can you please explain the reason behind this?
